'''chapojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fogie|fogie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fogie|fogie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chapojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpejeth|chæpejeth]] || [[word:chæpejej|chæpejej]] || [[word:chæpejesh|chæpejesh]] || [[word:chæpeje|chæpeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapopojoth|chapopojoth]] || [[word:chapopojoj|chapopojoj]] || [[word:chapopojosh|chapopojosh]] || [[word:chapopojo|chapopojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapojoth|chapojoth]] || [[word:chapojoj|chapojoj]] || [[word:chapojosh|chapojosh]] || [[word:chapojo|chapojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapofjoth|chapofjoth]] || [[word:chapofjoj|chapofjoj]] || [[word:chapofjosh|chapofjosh]] || [[word:chapofjof|chapofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapojotho|chapojotho]] || [[word:chapojojo|chapojojo]] || [[word:chapojosho|chapojosho]] || [[word:chapojoko|chapojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapojoth|chapojoth]] || [[word:chapojoj|chapojoj]] || [[word:chapojosh|chapojosh]] || [[word:chapojo|chapojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapojothol|chapojothol]] || [[word:chapojojol|chapojojol]] || [[word:chapojoshol|chapojoshol]] || [[word:chapojokol|chapojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapojothotho|chapojothotho]] || [[word:chapojojojo|chapojojojo]] || [[word:chapojoshosho|chapojoshosho]] || [[word:chapojoko|chapojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapojothon|chapojothon]] || [[word:chapojojon|chapojojon]] || [[word:chapojoshon|chapojoshon]] || [[word:chapojokon|chapojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapojothoro|chapojothoro]] || [[word:chapojojoro|chapojojoro]] || [[word:chapojoshoro|chapojoshoro]] || [[word:chapojokoro|chapojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
